case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. NAYARA PEREIRA DE MOURA

docket_entries.description: RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL SENT TO DEFENDANT- UNABLE TO FORWARD -
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00); PROOF OF SERVICE STAMPED: VIA FAX FILE SERVED JAN-11-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE MOURA, NAYARA PEREIRA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC, REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NAYARA PEREIRA DE MOURA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $531.97 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE MOURA, NAYARA PEREIRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
